title: gnome-control-center bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[40.0-42]
- Fix crash with non-supported tuned-ppd profiles

[40.0-41]
- Update zh_CN translations for Keyboard settings
  Related: RHEL-11909

[40.0-40]
- Allow launching subscription registration dialog directly
  Related: RHEL-4101
full_text:
[40.0-42]
- Fix crash with non-supported tuned-ppd profiles

[40.0-41]
- Update zh_CN translations for Keyboard settings
  Related: RHEL-11909

[40.0-40]
- Allow launching subscription registration dialog directly
  Related: RHEL-4101
